titleStmt.title: SII 40.254: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 254. (A.R. No. B. 299 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the compound of the Sakalēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1072, Vishu Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sakalēśvaradēva of Māvuṇḍala by Sūradēva, son of Bākula Jakkana of Kaludiṇḍi, for the merit of his parents. The gift was entrusted to Bollebōya, son of Pōtiyabōya, for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1072 gunēṁṭi viṣuma
saṁkrāṁtti nimityamuna kaludiṁḍi bākula jakkana
koḍku sūradēva tallidaṁḍrulaku dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugā
māvuṁḍala śrī sakalēśvara mahādēvarakakha
ṇḍavattidīpaṁbunakiccina goṟiyalu 55 dī
niṁjēkoni pōtiya bōyuni koḍku bollebōyuḍu dana
putrānapautrakamumācaṁdrā¨rkkamu dēvaradīpaṁbuna
ku nityamāneṁḍu nēyi voyaṁgalavāṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 40.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
